creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
For me, this is fixed by updating openjdk11 to run withou llvm12 (instead of 13). That change was committed on August 31:

commit e3f56d3c663dd21857843e187524d601b7dca29b
Author: Piotr Kubaj <pkubaj@FreeBSD.org>
Date:   Wed Aug 31 01:00:18 2022 +0200

    java/openjdk11: use LLVM 12 to build if the system compiler is LLVM 13 or newer
    
bug #260319
